name: aiaget
description: Private-deployable enterprise agent platform for agents, model governance, RAG, tools, approvals, and observability.

scripts.build:prod: pnpm --filter @aiaget/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @aiaget/external-api-sdk build && pnpm --filter @aiaget/control-api build && pnpm --filter @aiaget/web build
scripts.dev:control-api: pnpm --filter @aiaget/shared-types build && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && pnpm --filter @aiaget/control-api dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter @aiaget/shared-types build && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && pnpm --filter @aiaget/web dev
scripts.verify:sdk-release: pnpm --filter @aiaget/external-api-sdk test && pnpm --filter @aiaget/external-api-sdk typecheck:examples && pnpm --filter @aiaget/external-api-sdk pack:check && node --test scripts/tests/validate-external-sdk-package.test.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @aiaget/shared-types build && node --test scripts/tests/*.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @aiaget/control-api test && pnpm --filter @aiaget/web test:ia
scripts.verify:prod-template: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.production.yml --env-file .env.production.example config >/dev/null && pnpm verify:observability-template && pnpm verify:prod-runbook
scripts.verify:prod: pnpm validate:prod-env && docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.production.yml --env-file .env.production config >/dev/null && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && python3 -m compileall apps/agent-runtime/app
